items.title: node-pty installs and the PTY binding loads + spawns
steps: 1. npm install (runs the postinstall spawn-helper chmod fix).
2. Spawn a PTY and run a command.
items.expected: node-pty loads; a shell spawns and echoes output (real TTY).
items.evidence: node-pty@1.1.0 installed; postinstall scripts/fix-node-pty.mjs restores the spawn-helper execute bit; manual spawn printed PTY_RUNS.

items.title: Create / list / kill terminals via the service
items.expected: create returns {id, projectId, createdAt}; list includes it; kill removes it; missing project → TERMINAL_PROJECT_NOT_FOUND.
items.evidence: TerminalProcessService.test.ts (5 passed): create+list, kill removes, project-not-found.

items.title: PTY output streams to a WS client and input reaches the shell
items.precondition: HTTP server with the terminal WS relay attached.
items.expected: Client receives the command output; a connection without terminalId is rejected.
items.evidence: terminalWebSocket.test.ts (2 passed): streams output + accepts input; rejects missing terminalId.

items.title: Scrollback is replayed to a late subscriber
items.expected: The new subscriber immediately receives the buffered scrollback.
items.evidence: TerminalProcessService.test.ts: 'replays scrollback to a late subscriber'.

items.title: Multiple terminals + reload persistence in the UI
items.precondition: App running; on the TERMINAL tab of a project.
steps: 2. Run a long-lived command in one.
items.expected: After reload, the same terminals are listed and reconnect with their recent scrollback restored; the long command is still running.
items.evidence: Backend persistence + scrollback proven by T2–T4; full reload behavior needs the running app + browser.

items.title: Resize reflows the terminal (fit addon)
items.expected: The terminal reflows; the PTY receives the new cols/rows.
items.evidence: Resize wired via FitAddon + onResize → ws resize; needs the running app.

items.title: Server shutdown kills PTYs; no orphans; no PTY output logged
items.expected: PTYs are reaped on shutdown (bindSignals); no shell processes remain; logs contain no PTY input/output.
items.evidence: bindSignals reaps on SIGINT/SIGTERM (mirrors ClaudeProcessService); onData never logs payloads. Manual ps check needs the running app.
